title: Two verbs: compact-log and compact-check
action: Per D3/D17/D18/D20. Register TWO verbs only — `state compact-log --event <precompact|resume> --session-id <id> [--json]` and `state compact-check --session-id <id> [--json]` — following the state.handoff.write precedent (command-registry.mjs:877-905 entry shape; handler in skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs; one line in the name-to-handler map at bee.mjs:4992-4994). The third verb, `state compact-capsule`, is deliberately NOT registered here: skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs:2558 asserts that EVERY registry entry had its example executed, unconditionally over the whole registry, so registering a verb whose builder does not exist yet turns the repo red. It lands in chx-5 with its builder. compact-check's JSON output includes an anchor_missing check carrying the same command D10's nudge names, which is how the nudge stays reachable without a hook (D3). Per 20260712-dispatcher-unify.md the registry examples are executed contract — each must actually run. THE DISPATCHER SOURCE IS skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs, NOT .bee/bin/bee.mjs (D17); scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs does not cover bee.mjs (scripts/test_native_probe.mjs:355-357) and 8 suites drive the installed copy, so copy both edited files to .bee/bin/ and re-run release_manifest --write plus the self-onboard in this cell (D20) BEFORE verify. Author scripts/test_compact_verbs.mjs following the runBee/record conventions at scripts/test_conformance.mjs:44,95-97,51-55, including a negative-control row proving compact-check mutated nothing.

truths: Both verbs appear in `node .bee/bin/bee.mjs --help --json` with parameters, description and runnable examples derived from the registry entry.
`node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs` is green — every registry entry, including the two new ones, had its example executed.
state compact-check exits non-zero only on a usage error, never on a detected mismatch — a mismatch is reported data, not a failure.
release_manifest --check and ledger_parity --check are green at cap time.
artifacts: Two registry entries, two handlers, two dispatch-map lines, refreshed .bee/bin/ copies, scripts/test_compact_verbs.mjs
prohibitions: Never register state compact-capsule in this cell — its builder does not exist until chx-5 and the registry coverage gate is unconditional.

verify: node scripts/test_compact_verbs.mjs && node scripts/test_conformance.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check

trace.dropped_reason: Revision 2 failed validation (6 CRITICAL). Superseded by revision 3 under D23-D26: widened regen trigger, PreCompact row split, four-way count vocabulary, corrected handoffOutcome premise.
